action_boundary: May treasury execute the funds movement or cash-management action now? Focus: bank portal admin approval.
communication_boundary: Treasury execution cannot proceed from urgency, relationship history, or payment pressure; current source authority must close the exact boundary.

documents.text: Policy rule for Treasury / wire / cash movement controls: execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.
